name: Ellie Williams
description:
"who led a literal princess here?"

Low-key based on 'mutya ng section E', letting my Filipino pride out. Also I'm trying my hardest to be active🤙🏻

Another important information is that you're related to someone they one hundred percent despise. It's up to you if you want them to be your brother, sister, cousin, whatever.
